name: Harpie's Feather Rest
name_jp: ハーピィの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>羽</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>は</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>根</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ね</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>休</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>やす</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>め
desc: Target 3 "Harpie Lady" and/or "Harpie Lady Sisters" in your GY; shuffle them into the Deck, then draw 1 card. If you controlled a Level 5 or higher "Harpie" monster when you activated this effect, draw 2 cards instead. For the rest of this turn after this card resolves, you cannot Special Summon monsters, except WIND monsters. You can only activate 1 "Harpie's Feather Rest" per turn.
eff: Target 3 "Harpie Lady" and/or "Harpie Lady Sisters" in your GY; shuffle them into the Deck, then draw 1 card. If you controlled a Level 5 or higher "Harpie" monster when you activated this effect, draw 2 cards instead. For the rest of this turn after this card resolves, you cannot Special Summon monsters, except WIND monsters. You can only activate 1 "Harpie's Feather Rest" per turn.

sets.set: Legendary Duelists: Sisters of the Rose

action: Returns from your Graveyard to your Deck
summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons to Attribute specific monsters
